---
name: Correction
about: Report an inaccuracy, broken link, or rendering issue
title: "[fix] <short description>"
labels: ["correction"]
---

**Where?**
File path and section heading, e.g. `docs/01-programming-fundamentals/async-concurrency.md` → "The GIL" subsection.

**What's wrong?**
Be specific. Quote the current text if helpful.

**What should it say instead?**
Your proposed fix (or just "unsure" and I'll investigate).

**Source (if fact-correction)**
Link to official docs, paper, or authoritative post.
